title: Documents
uploadCta: Upload documents from the CircleCare app on your phone.
errorHint: Check your connection and try again.
noDocumentsHint: Keep your loved one's important documents in one place — insurance cards, records, directives — so everyone helping can find them when it matters.
noDocumentsHintReadOnly: Documents shared with this circle will appear here so everyone helping can find them when it matters.
pdfFallbackHint: PDF not displaying? Open it in a new tab or download it.

upload.title: Upload a document
upload.fileHint: JPG, PNG, HEIC, or PDF. Up to {{max}}.
upload.storageFull: This circle has reached its storage limit. Free up space or upgrade to Premium to add more.
upload.storageFullPremium: This circle has reached its 1GB storage limit. Free up space to add more.

errors.fileType: Use a JPG, PNG, HEIC, or PDF file.
errors.fileTooLarge: This file is too large. The limit is {{max}}.
errors.storageFull: This file would exceed the circle's storage limit.
errors.labelRequired: Enter a name for this document.
errors.noteTooLong: Notes can be up to 500 characters.
